About me

  • Home
  • Tags
  • About
  • Dark mode

Hi, I’m Marek Kałużny. I work as a Solution Architect in healthcare technology.

My background is in software development, but these days my work is mostly about architecture, interoperability and helping teams deliver complex things more clearly.

What I enjoy most is working where technology meets real healthcare needs. I’m especially interested in FHIR, interoperability, system design and building solutions that stay practical under real delivery pressure.

This blog is where I share thoughts on architecture, FHIR, healthcare technology and the kind of delivery trade-offs that rarely make it into slides. I try to keep it practical, honest and useful.

If you work in digital health, interoperability or healthcare product engineering, I hope you’ll find something useful here.

The views shared here are my own.

· LinkedIn
